# Email Deliverability Skill

Email Deliverability Skill is a skill package for inbox placement, authentication, reputation, and remediation workflows.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add emaildeliverabilityskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/skills/emaildeliverabilityskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Email Deliverability Strategy: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Email Deliverability Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Email Deliverability Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://emaildeliverabilityskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
